title: lastrea dutrae
intro: Lastrea dutrae, also known as the Dutra's Lady Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Athyriaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The Dutra's Lady Fern has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and protecting against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
